message:
fix(connectors): update capability token tests to use separate cap-id and operations params

The generate_valid_token helper in both notion and stripe connector tests
now accepts an explicit operations slice, aligning test tokens with the
updated CapabilityTokenBuilder API where capability_id (the broad
permission family like "notion.read") is distinct from the granular
operations list (e.g. ["notion.get_page"]).  This matches the runtime
token semantics introduced for finer-grained capability gating.

Connectors changed: notion (9 call sites), stripe (11 call sites).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
